text: arxiv (June 2025) published a decade survey of AI-driven style transfer -- tracing the evolution from Gatys et al. (2015) Neural Algorithm of Artistic Style (optimizing image pixels to match content + style representations from VGG) through real-time feed-forward methods (Johnson et al. 2016, perceptual loss) to diffusion-based style transfer (2023-2025) -- documenting that diffusion models (Stable Diffusion + ControlNet + IP-Adapter) achieve 10-100x speedup while offering fine-grained control over style intensity, local regions, and multi-style blending.

ScienceDirect Neurocomputing (April 2025) published a comprehensive review of style transfer metrics and evaluation -- identifying the key challenge of evaluating artistic quality (no ground truth) -- and documenting that CLIP-based perceptual metrics, user studies, and artist evaluation panels are the emerging gold standard, while traditional pixel-wise metrics (PSNR, SSIM) fail to capture artistic quality.
